description: Parallel rendering exploration -- multi-instance frame splitting across multiple Puppeteer instances, each rendering a chunk of frames to a separate FFmpeg process, then concatenating the chunks. Could reduce a 15-minute render to under 4 minutes with 4 parallel instances. Addresses OQ-10. Low priority -- single-instance rendering may be sufficient for V1.
notes: Tier 6 exploration. Low priority. Addresses OQ-10.
